title: docxology/template
summary: Production-grade scaffold for reproducible computational research — 10-stage DAG pipelines, ≥90% test coverage, cryptographic provenance (SHA-256 + steganographic PDF watermarking), multi-project workspace, AI-agent-ready with AGENTS.md / SKILL.md throughout.

title: janaador0827-commits/simulacra-forge
summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: jpoindexter/Vanta
summary: A local AI agent with a Rust safety kernel that gates every action — goal-aware, provider-agnostic, self-hosted. MIT.

title: askalf/hybrid
summary: Local-first LLM router: answer the easy majority on a small local model, escalate only the hard queries to any OpenAI-compatible frontier endpoint. ~160 lines, stdlib-only.

title: supernavyl/emily-loop
summary: Autonomous plan–execute–learn loop for local LLMs — parallel step dispatch, SQLite+FTS5 failure memory, resumable checkpoints

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: supernovae-st/nika
summary: Intent as Code | the workflow language for AI. One file, 4 verbs, one Rust binary. Local-first, any model, AGPL-3.0. 🦋

title: OgreScat/AgentGRIT
summary: Governance-first AI agent runtime — cost-first routing to the cheapest capable model, self-enforced bylaws, a trust ladder, and evidence before done. A framework, not a product: bring your own agents. FSL-1.1-MIT.

title: SoCloseSociety/GDriveFiltering
summary: Back up your entire Google Drive (My Drive, Shared Drives, Shared with me) locally, then verify, dedupe and reorganize it — safely. Fast, resumable, read-only, with a live dashboard.

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

title: mezmo/aura
summary: AURA is an agentic harness that turns an LLM model into a reliable, autonomous service capable of executing real SRE work. AURA provides the guardrails, API servers, state management, authentication, streaming, error handling, and tool integrations necessary to run AI SRE agents safely in production.

title: epatel/model-benchmark
summary: Benchmark AI coding models (Claude + Ollama local/cloud) on small tasks with ground-truth test oracles — bug fixes, features, refactors, race conditions & deadlocks.

title: supernavyl/omnilect
summary: Electron "read-everything" reader — import anything, clean Doc view, Kokoro read-aloud TTS, and a local-AI sidebar via Ollama.

title: Alexx-coder/Cortex
summary: Secure Multi-Agent AI Framework

title: JWhite212/context-recall
summary: macOS daemon that auto-detects Teams meetings, transcribes locally with faster-whisper, and produces structured summaries via Local Modals or Claude API

title: Anirudhx7/ollama-mesh
summary: The control plane for self-hosted AI inference. Warm-state GPU routing, multi-runtime orchestration across Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp, and TGI. Single Go binary. Apache-2.0.

title: waleedmandour/CorpusMind
summary: Local-first, AI-native research environment for corpus linguistics and multimodal discourse analysis. Engine (FastAPI), web (PWA), desktop (Tauri 2), full 12 statistics with tests, AGPL-3.0.

title: mingux/hush-brain
summary: Local-first AI agent orchestrator & monitor with a persistent markdown brain. Styled after the Matrix.

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.
